_readme: The Jesus Website MCP Client Configuration. Copy relevant sections into your MCP client's config file (e.g. ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json). Adjust paths to match your environment.

the-jesus-website._variant: Production (VPS) - uses the venv Python and absolute paths. Delete this entry and use the local-dev variant instead when running locally.

the-jesus-website-local._variant: Local development - run from the project root directory so database/database.sqlite resolves correctly.
the-jesus-website-local._note: Rename this entry to 'the-jesus-website' (or delete the production variant above) before using.
